prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: HUMAN RHOA COMPLEXED WITH GTP ANALOGUE. Entity description: TRANSFORMING PROTEIN RHOA. Entry keywords: ONCOGENE PROTEIN SMALL G-PROTEIN, SIGNAL TRANSDUCTION, GTPASE, RAS SUPERFAMILY, ONCOGENE PROTEIN. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.434066; mean_interface=0.285401; max_segment_membrane_density=0.809524; mean_disorder=0.154337. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 cofactor sentinel source. cofactor_context ligand_context cofactor-stabilized soluble core; components: MG. Not assembly_required_core and no explicit transmembrane topology evidence.
